header.title: Saint John the Baptist church in Chanac (5).jpg
header.description:
View of the bell tower of the Saint John the Baptist church from Rue du Planaguet in Chanac, Lozère, France





 
This building is inscrit au titre des monuments historiques de la France. It is indexed in the base Mérimée, a database of architectural heritage maintained by the French Ministry of Culture, under the reference PA48000025 .
